summary: Added BackupScheduler class with 5-minute debounce, markDirty(immediate?), and dispose(). Created BackupContext with visibilitychange listener. Integrated markDirty(true) triggers in MarmotContext (createGroup, inviteByNpub, leaveGroup, Welcome/group joined) and ProfileContext (saveProfile). 6 new tests cover immediate publish, debounce enforcement, post-window publish, dispose cleanup, deferred scheduling, and coalescing.
verification_notes: Fixed missing markBackupDirty(true) in Welcome (group joined) callback in MarmotContext. All verification questions passed.
